page.heading: Study with a team
page.subtitle: Create a small workspace, invite classmates, and start tracking shared progress.

create.title: Create your team
create.description: Free beta teams support up to 5 seats. Billing is not required.
create.limit: One beta team per account for now.

workspace.title: Team workspace
workspace.privacy: Only high-level progress is shared in this beta. Writing submissions and detailed practice answers stay private.

invite.title: Invite members
invite.description: Share this link with classmates. It expires in 7 days and joins them as members.

join.heading: Join {team}
join.subtitle: {count}/{limit} seats used
join.privacy: By joining, your team can see high-level learning progress such as activity, streak, and review totals. Detailed submissions stay private.

empty.title: No team yet
empty.description: Create a team now, then invite members from your workspace.
